name: Spawn Team
description: Create a full team of agents in one call by combining persona templates. Specify role counts like '3 developers, 1 QA, 1 DevOps' and all agents are created automatically with the correct skills and configuration.

members.description: List of role specs. Each entry defines a persona_key and how many agents to create.

count.description: How many agents of this role to create.

name_prefix.description: Optional prefix added before the role name, e.g. 'Backend' → 'Backend Developer 1'.

overrides.description: Optional field overrides (soul, skills, tools, system_prompt, etc.).

team_name.description: Optional label for this team (returned in the response for reference).
